sutta: [Music] body witness body witness is called sir and as to what has the body witness been declared by the exalted 1 considers the monk who aloo from sen's desire enters and abides in the first jana and to the extent of that sphere abides with body attune to it thus faster in 1 particular has the body witness been declared by the exalted 1 and similarly for the second jana third jana for jana a sphere of infinite space infinite consciousness nothingness neither perception nor non-perception and the ending of perception and feeling so here this is talking about body witness kaya sakin kaya sakin is a person who has sometimes it is uh translated and testified with the body but probably you can also call it a body witness he has become a witness with his body which means usually this this this person body uh witness is a person who has developed the janus has developed concentration as his main point his strength is in attaining the janus and this is 1 of the aryans 1 of the 7 types of aryans mentioned in the kitagiri suta in and this body witness is not yet an arahant he is a seika 1 who is possibly a sakadagaming second fruition person or a third fruition person or a fraud a path attain but not yet a fourth fruit attainer not yet an arahant so this is the body witness the next is
